name: Razorpay gRPC Test Suite
scenario: The streaming payment confirmation RPC crashed in production (edge case with amount > ₹10L). Build a comprehensive gRPC test suite using InProcessServer that would have caught this bug — covering unary, streaming, auth, and error paths.

core.description: TestStreamObserver<T> implements StreamObserver<T>: CopyOnWriteArrayList for values, CountDownLatch(1) decremented on onCompleted or onError. awaitCompletion(5, SECONDS) with assertTrue for timeout.

PaymentServiceImpl: createPayment(request) unary — validates amount > 0, merchantId not blank, returns PaymentResponse. streamStatus(paymentId, observer) — sends INITIATED, PROCESSING, CONFIRMED then onCompleted.
Unary test: createPayment happy path — response has paymentId and status='CREATED'. Unary error: createPayment with amount=0 → assertThrows StatusRuntimeException INVALID_ARGUMENT.
Streaming test: streamStatus('PAY-001', observer) → awaitCompletion → 3 values → order: INITIATED, PROCESSING, CONFIRMED. Error test: invalid paymentId → onError called.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): unary happy, unary INVALID_ARGUMENT, stream 3 updates in order, stream error for invalid ID. All pass.
README: explains why InProcessServer catches bugs that pure unit tests miss (real proto serialization + gRPC framework tested).

bonus.description: @ParameterizedTest for invalid amounts: Stream.of(0L, -1L, -500L, 10_000_001L). Each must throw StatusRuntimeException INVALID_ARGUMENT. 4 parameterized test cases all pass.
Mock dependency test: PaymentGrpcService depends on PaymentRepository. @Mock repo. Test: repo.save() called with correct args. Test: repo throws → service returns Status.INTERNAL.
Bidirectional streaming test: EchoService receives 3 messages, echoes each. TestStreamObserver captures echoes. Assert order matches input.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. awaitCompletion() is mandatory before any assertion on streaming results — CountDownLatch.await() blocks until onCompleted or onError is called. Missing this is the #1 streaming test bug. assertThrows(StatusRuntimeException.class) — NOT Exception.class. Always use the specific type and then check getStatus().getCode(). CopyOnWriteArrayList for TestStreamObserver.values: thread-safe because gRPC may call onNext from a different thread than the test. generateName() for InProcess: call once and use the SAME name for both InProcessServerBuilder and InProcessChannelBuilder. Always shutdown in @AfterEach: channel.shutdownNow().awaitTermination(5, SECONDS); server.shutdownNow().
